Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x7B00 "ACEAIRCOMBATEMULATOR-7B00" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "ACE - Air Combat Emulator.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
The loading screen is from the disk version.
Note: the original version of this game came with a colour grid protection card, although this version along with several others do not require it.
